'''''Alliance Intelligence Reports''''' is a 95-page paperback supplement to ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[West End Games]]. It was written by [[Bill Smith]] and published [[June]] [[1995]].

It was set [[2 ABY/Legends|two years]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Contents==
''Alliance Intelligence Reports'' is presented as a compendium of "datafiles" about non-Imperial threats to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. It is divided into the following chapters:

*'''Introduction''' about how to use the book.
*'''[[Task Force on Alliance Security|The Task Force on Alliance Security]]''', including information on some of the Rebel characters who had written the datafiles. They include characters from the movies and [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]] characters, with a special emphasis on the [[Eclipse Team]].
**[[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Anson Blazer]]
**[[Lieutenant Colonel/Legends|Lieutenant Colonel]] [[Beryl Chiffonage]]
**[[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]

*'''[[Brosin Underground]]''', an anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] resistance group on the planet [[Brosi]]. Due to its methods, the Underground perturbs Rebel operations in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]], and vice versa.
**[[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]
**[[Randle Clanse]]

*'''[[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]]''', a training planet for scouts led by [[Barosa Warren]] (who is also the father of different Rebels). Although [[Twilight Class|many members of the Eclipse Team]] were alumni of the GOSS, now they are threatened by their alma mater.

*'''[[Granse Confederacy]]''', an eight-member bounty hunter team led by [[Callandri]]. It was probably created with the specific purpose of killing Rebel Lieutenant [[Alton Lochner]], who is Callandri's object of hatred.

*'''[[Hydrospeare Corporation]]''', a company designing military aquatic equipment for the Empire. Although they were not responsible for the uses of that equipment, the quality of their products was too high to ignore. The datafiles include information on its [[Design Team Beta]].
**Dr. [[Tolum Harous]]
**[[Mosara Thiirn]], SpecForce technician
**[[Diran Miciluz]]

**[[Explorer Submergible]]
**[[AQ-5 Waveskimmer]]
**[[Aquadon CAVa 400]]
**[[Combat Aquaspeeder|Aquadon Combat Aquaspeeder]]
*'''[[m'Yalfor'ac Order]]''', a planetary army on [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]]. The native [[Bitthævrian/Legends|Bitthævrians]], strong Republic-haters, had extended their hatred to the Alliance to Restore the Republic, although their obsolete gear makes them little threat beyond their orbits.
*'''[[Mytaranor Slaving Council]]''', a great group of organized slavers on [[Mytaranor sector/Legends|Mytaranor sector]], led by slave-turned-slaver Talas Piran.
**[[Tir'uh]], a [[Noehon]] slaver
**[[Bnar VII]]
**[[Rian Rann]], [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]

**[[Stun baton/Legends|Stun baton]]
**[[TholCorp]] [[Neuronic whip/Legends|Neuronic whip]]
**[[Vanquisher (Kiltirin-class)|''Vanquisher'']]
*'''[[Ploovo's Protocol Team]]''', a small group of thugs collecting "forgotten" payments for loan shark [[Ploovo Two-For-One/Legends|Ploovo Two-For-One]]. They appear on the cover of the book.
**[[Beatas]]
**[[Durmag]]
**[[EV-4D9]]
**[[HN-TR1]]
**[[Lotas]]
*'''[[Ssach'thirix]] and [[Kal-tan-shi]]''', two rival bounty hunters, both of them threats to the Alliance. Their enmity made them a double threat.
*'''[[Venithon Twins]]''', two [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] pirates with resources
**[[Denuab Venithon]]
**[[Dorin Venithon]]
**''[[Venithon Bandit]]'', [[Ghtroc Industries/Legends|Ghtroc Industries]] [[580 freighter|Class 580 freighter]]
